summary: Layout frame that owns padding, overflow and min-width:0 (containment). Optional hairline surface.
notes: Spacing comes from --sp-* tokens via the --lds-box-pad custom property; min-width:0 is always applied so content cannot overflow the frame. overflow='auto'|'scroll' creates a scrollable region; when its contents are not focusable, add tabIndex={0} and an aria-label for keyboard a11y (axe scrollable-region-focusable).
